memory.features: ECC or non-ECC (ECC function supported only on Xeon processor), dual-channel capable

pen: ThinkPad Pen Pro, active pen for multi-touch display

Bluetooth.form: Integrated in Wi-Fi + Bluetooth combo adapter

ports: 4-in-1 reader (MMC, SD, SDHC, SDXC), supports UHS-II SD card
camera: HD 720p resolution, low light sensitive, fixed focus
audio: HD Audio, Realtek ALC3268 codec / stereo speakers, 2W x 2 / dual array microphone, combo audio/microphone jack
keyboard: 6-row, spill-resistant, multimedia Fn keys, optional LED backlight
3-button TrackPoint pointing device and 3-button crystal silk surface multi-touch touchpad

physical.dimensions: Non-Touch: 416mm x 275.5mm x 22.9-34.2mm ; Touch: 416mm x 275.5mm x 30.6-34.9mm
physical.weight: Non-touch model: starting at 7.3 lb (3.3kg); Multi-touch model: starting at 8.1 lb (3.7kg)
physical.case_material: Display cover: Glass-Fiber + PPS; Bottom: Magnesium/Aluminum

color calibration: Pantone color calibrator by X-Rite color calibration sensor
system: Windows 7 Professional 64 preinstalled through downgrade rights in Windows 10 Pro 64
